cves.description: Reproducible incident micro-postmortem for on-prem Microsoft SharePoint “ToolShell” (CVE-2025-53770): ATT&CK snapshot, “logs that matter” table, three hunts (KQL/SPL/Sigma), first-4-hours comms, sample data, and figures. Built for fast triage; no org data; SharePoint Online out of scope.
Fully automated Confluence RCE exploit (CVE-2023-22527 + OGNL injection)   100% from scratch • Python • 2025
